user.title: Grid Lens Setup
user.description: Tell us your location and create your GridLens account.

data_description.gridlens_email: Used to create your free GridLens account.

sensors.title: Energy Sensors
sensors.description:
{discovered}

Grid import and export sensors must measure cumulative energy (kWh/MWh) with state_class: total_increasing — not instantaneous power (W/kW).

data_description.energy_sensor: Cumulative kWh/MWh imported from the grid. Must have state_class: total_increasing.
data_description.solar_sensor: Cumulative kWh/MWh generated by your solar panels.
data_description.grid_export_sensor: Cumulative kWh/MWh exported to the grid.
data_description.import_price_sensor: Current Amber purchase price in $/kWh (sensor.amber_nsw1_general_price or similar). Used for accurate current-plan cost calculation.
data_description.export_price_sensor: Current Amber feed-in price in $/kWh for exports.

battery.title: Battery Configuration
battery.description:
If you have a home battery, configure it here.

• Your current plan cost uses **actual** battery behaviour from your sensors.
• Alternative plans show costs with **optimally** scheduled battery usage so you can see the true potential saving.

data_description.battery_capacity: Total usable capacity in kWh (e.g. Sigenergy 10 kWh)
data_description.battery_min_soc: Reserve charge level to keep for backup (%)
data_description.battery_max_soc: Maximum charge level for battery health (%)
data_description.battery_soc_sensor: Sensor reporting current battery charge as a percentage
data_description.battery_charge_power_sensor: Signed power sensor for the battery (positive = charging, negative = discharging). Used to read your actual battery behaviour.

devices.title: Deferrable Loads
devices.description:
These appliances were found in your Energy Dashboard. Select any that can be **rescheduled to cheaper hours** — the optimizer will find the best time to run them under each plan.

Typical deferrable loads: EV charger, pool pump, dishwasher, washing machine, water heater.

device_power.title: Deferrable Load Power Limits
device_power.description:
Enter the maximum rated power (kW) for each selected deferrable device. This caps how much power the optimizer can assign to these loads in any given hour — without this, it can pile everything into one cheap hour which isn't physically realistic.

{devices}

current_plan.title: Your Current Plan
current_plan.description:
Select the electricity plan you are currently on.

This creates your **free Grid Lens account**, which compares your current plan against itself so you can see your cost breakdown.

[Upgrade at gridlens.au/pricing](https://gridlens.au/pricing) to compare against all available plans in your state and find out if you could be paying less.

subscribe.title: Unlock All Plans
subscribe.description:
Your free account compares your current plan only.

Subscribe to compare against every available plan in your state and find out if you're on the best deal. The next page will open gridlens.au — complete your subscription there, then return here automatically.

Or close that page to continue with your free account.

manual_key.title: Enter Your API Key
manual_key.description:
This Home Assistant installation is already registered with Grid Lens.

Enter your existing API key to compare against all available plans in your state.

Don't have a key yet? [Subscribe at gridlens.au/pricing](https://gridlens.au/pricing).

error.wrong_unit_power: This sensor measures power (W/kW), not energy. You need a cumulative energy sensor (kWh/MWh).
error.wrong_unit: Wrong unit of measurement — must be kWh or MWh.
error.wrong_state_class: This sensor does not have state_class: total_increasing. It may not be a cumulative energy sensor.
error.invalid_capacity: Battery capacity must be greater than 0 kWh.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the GridLens API. Check the API URL and your internet connection.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — check the key and try again.

data_description.energy_sensor: Cumulative kWh/MWh imported from the grid.
data_description.solar_sensor: Cumulative kWh/MWh generated by your solar panels.
data_description.grid_export_sensor: Cumulative kWh/MWh exported to the grid.
data_description.import_price_sensor: Current import price sensor in $/kWh (e.g. sensor.flow_power_nsw1_import_price). Used for accurate current-plan cost calculation.

devices.title: Deferrable Loads
devices.description: Select appliances from your Energy Dashboard that can be rescheduled to cheaper hours.

device_power.title: Deferrable Load Power Limits
device_power.description:
Enter the maximum rated power (kW) for each selected deferrable device.

{devices}

current_plan.title: Your Current Plan
current_plan.description: Select the electricity plan you are currently on.

api_key.title: Grid Lens API Key
api_key.description:
Your API key gives you access to all available plans in your state so you can see exactly which plan suits you best.

Leave unchanged to keep your current key, or paste a new one below.

Get a key at [gridlens.au/pricing](https://gridlens.au/pricing).

data_description.gridlens_api_key: Leave blank or unchanged to keep using your existing key.

error.wrong_unit_power: This sensor measures power (W/kW), not energy.
error.wrong_unit: Wrong unit — must be kWh or MWh.
error.wrong_state_class: Not a cumulative energy sensor (state_class: total_increasing required).
error.invalid_capacity: Battery capacity must be greater than 0 kWh.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — check the key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Grid Lens API. Check your internet connection.
